---
title: ""
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    css: styles.css
---

<div class="hero-section">
  <div class="hero-text">
    <h1>Feiran Zhang</h1>
    <div class="hero-subtitle">MPH Candidate in Biostatistics &middot; Emory University</div>
    <div class="hero-location">
      <i class="fa fa-map-marker"></i> Atlanta, GA &nbsp;&nbsp;
      <i class="fa fa-envelope"></i> feiranz116@gmail.com
    </div>
    <p style="max-width:560px; color:#4a5568; margin-top:10px;">
      I am a graduate student in Biostatistics at Emory University's Rollins School of Public Health, 
      with a strong background in statistical modeling, environmental epidemiology, and public health data science. 
      My work focuses on applying rigorous quantitative methods to address real-world health challenges.
    </p>
  </div>
</div>

## About Me

<hr class="section-divider">

I am passionate about using data to understand and address public health challenges. My research at Emory 
spans **Bayesian spatial modeling**, **environmental epidemiology**, and **multi-pollutant exposure analysis**. 
I have hands-on experience in R programming, statistical modeling, and translating complex analytical 
results into actionable public health insights.

Before joining Emory, I completed a Bachelor of Economics in Economic Statistics at Henan University 
of Economics and Law (in collaboration with Old Dominion University), where I developed a strong 
quantitative foundation and led multiple research and field projects.

<div class="info-grid">
  <div class="info-card">
    <h4>&#127891; Education</h4>
    <p><strong>MPH, Biostatistics</strong><br>Emory University (2026)<br>GPA: 3.91/4.0</p>
  </div>
  <div class="info-card">
    <h4>&#128202; Research Focus</h4>
    <p>Bayesian Spatial Modeling &middot; Environmental Epidemiology &middot; Spatiotemporal Analysis</p>
  </div>
  <div class="info-card">
    <h4>&#128187; Technical Skills</h4>
    <p>R &middot; Python &middot; SAS &middot; SQL &middot; SPSS &middot; Power BI</p>
  </div>
  <div class="info-card">
    <h4>&#128203; Teaching</h4>
    <p>Teaching Assistant, BIOS 544<br>Intro to R &mdash; Emory University</p>
  </div>
</div>

## Experience Highlights

<hr class="section-divider">

**Data Analysis Intern** &mdash; Zhengzhou Second Hospital *(2023–2024)*  
Applied regression and descriptive analyses in R to characterize patient epidemiology and treatment effectiveness. Developed data visualization reports to support clinical and administrative decision-making.

**Data Analysis Intern** &mdash; Fuwai Central China Cardiovascular Hospital *(Summer 2023)*  
Cleaned and validated pediatric blood-pressure datasets, created visualizations to evaluate a school–community screening model for childhood hypertension.

**Published Work:** Zhang, F. (2023). *Analysis of the Impact of Smoking on Population Health.* 
Presented at the 2023 Annual Conference of China Population Association.

<div class="footer-section">
  &copy; 2025 Feiran Zhang &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Built with R Markdown &amp; GitHub Pages
</div>
